[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000110000 2
1 1001000000 2
2 0010100000 2
3 1111010100 6
4 1010000111 5
5 0110111111 8
6 1101011010 6
7 1010000110 4
